articles.title: GHSA: Klever-Go KVM: Throttler slot leak in trie account-data sync causes epoch bootstrap / state sync DoS
articles.summary:
## Summary

  The account-data trie syncers leak bounded throttler slots on error paths in `syncDataTrie()`. Each failed trie sync permanently consumes one slot from

  I confirmed this on the current default branch `develop` at commit `9640d63` (observed on May 20, 2026).

articles.title: GHSA: Vitest browser mode serves unsanitized otelCarrier query parameter as inline script
articles.summary:
## Summary

Vitest browser mode served `/__vitest_test__/` with the `otelCarrier` query parameter inserted directly into an inline module script. Because this value was treated as JavaScript source rather than data, an attacker could craft a browser-runner URL that executes arbitrary JavaScript in the Vitest server origin.
